OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_INDICATORS.description: Minutes between indicator fetches. Set to 0 to disable.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_INDICATORS.description: Epoch milliseconds for initial indicators fetch start date.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_YARA.description: Minutes between YARA rule fetches. Set to 0 to disable.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_YARA.description: Epoch milliseconds for initial YARA fetch start date.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_CVES.description: Minutes between CVE report fetches. Set to 0 to disable.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_CVES.description: Epoch milliseconds for initial CVE fetch start date.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_IOCS.description: Minutes between IOC fetches. Set to 0 to disable.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_IOCS.description: Epoch milliseconds for initial IOC fetch start date.
